news_items.headline: Nvidia achieved fiscal 2026 revenue of $215.9 billion, a 65% increase driven by strong AI adoption and CUDA platform growth
Nvidia Q revenue topped $68B, up 73% YoY on data center demand; company guided ~$78B for next quarter, beating analyst forecasts
SK Hynix gained as AI demand boosted memory-chip stocks, driving Kospi higher amid strong semiconductor momentum
SK hynix Q1 2026 revenue was KRW 52.6 trillion with 71.5% operating margin, representing 60% sequential growth
Samsung Electronics forecasts Q1 operating profit near $38 billion, about eight times year-earlier levels
Samsung Electronics earnings will be released on Apr 30, 2026; company flagged stronger-than-expected Q1 profit
Broadcom experiencing significant momentum driven by strong AI demand and strategic partnerships with Google, Meta, and Anthropic
Broadcom stock surged 45% since March 30, flipping bearish setup into powerful bullish trend on AI accelerator demand
Kakao signed partnership deal with OpenAI as part of ChatGPT developer's expansion of Stargate initiative
